title: PageLayoutSpec
description: Output of the Name (thumbnail) Stage. Describes per-panel grid positions, size classes, bubble zone reservations, and page-turn beats for one chapter. Consumed by page_compose.py, the Lettering Agent Balloon Planner, and MQG quality gates.

schema_version.description: SemVer string. Must be '1.0' for this version of the spec.

genre.description: Genre determines which layout guidelines apply.

reading_direction.description: Page reading order for panel position assignment.

target_page_count.description: Target number of pages in this chapter.

pages.description: Ordered list of page layout objects. Length must equal target_page_count.

PageLayout.description: Layout specification for a single manga page.

page_type.description: Page narrative role. 'opening_splash' = page 1 establishing page. 'silent' = all panels must have zero bubble_zones. 'high_action' = action-dominant layout.

panels.description: Ordered list of panels on this page. Must cover the full page area without overlap. Reading order follows panel array order.

page_turn_payoff.description: True if this page is designed as a page-turn reveal moment. For LTR reading, odd-numbered pages are right-hand pages — these are the primary payoff candidates.

page_turn_note.description: Human-readable editorial note explaining the page-turn payoff. Null if page_turn_payoff is false.

breath_panel_present.description: True if at least one panel on this page has emotional_role 'breath'. Required for MQG-03 establishing shot cadence check.

dialogue_density.description: Average number of bubble_zones per panel on this page. Computed as sum(len(panel.bubble_zones)) / len(panels). Used by MQG-08.

PanelLayout.description: Layout specification for a single panel within a page.

panel_id.description: Unique panel identifier. Must match panel_id in chapter_script_writer_handoff.json. Pattern: 'CH{chapterNN}_P{pageNN}_PL{panelNN}'.

size_class.description: Visual size class determining panel prominence. full_page=1/1 page. splash=2/3. large=1/2. medium=1/3. small=1/4. gutter=narrow accent strip.

bubble_zones.description: Reserved text placement zones within this panel. Empty array for silent/breath panels. Expressed as percentage of panel pixel dimensions (0-100 scale) so zones scale with render resolution.

emotional_role.description: Narrative function of this panel. Derived from panel_type + camera + silence_guard in the chapter script. Determines size class defaults and MQG-05 arc progression checks.

reading_order.description: 1-based reading sequence position within this page. Combined with page_number determines chapter-wide reading order.

protagonist_present.description: True if the protagonist character appears in this panel. Null = unknown (not yet determined). Used by MQG-07 character presence density check.

GridPosition.description: Position in the logical 12-column × 18-row grid used by the Name Stage layout algorithm. Grid cells are approximately 393px × 380px on a 5200×7200 page with 180px bleed margins.

row.description: 0-based top row of panel in 18-row grid.

col.description: 0-based left column of panel in 12-column grid.

row_span.description: Number of rows this panel spans.

col_span.description: Number of columns this panel spans.

BubbleZone.description: A reserved text placement zone within a panel. Coordinates are expressed as percentages (0-100) of the panel's pixel dimensions, so zones scale correctly with render resolution changes. The Lettering Agent Balloon Planner treats these zones as authoritative placement areas, bypassing heuristic placement.

x.description: Left edge of zone as percentage of panel width.

y.description: Top edge of zone as percentage of panel height.

w.description: Width of zone as percentage of panel width.

h.description: Height of zone as percentage of panel height.

type.description: Type of bubble/text element this zone is reserved for. Matches element types in MANGA_TEXT_RENDERING_SPEC.md.

speaker.description: Character name expected to speak in this zone. Used by the Balloon Planner for tail direction calculation. Null for SFX, narration, and caption zones.

priority.description: Reading order within panel if multiple zones (1 = read first). Defaults to 1 for single-zone panels.

PixelRect.description: Absolute pixel coordinates for panel placement on the final 5200×7200 page canvas. Used by the refactored page_compose.py to position rendered panel images. Origin is top-left of page canvas (0,0). Bleed margin starts at 180px from page edge.

x.description: Left edge of panel in pixels from page left edge. Minimum 180px (bleed margin).

y.description: Top edge of panel in pixels from page top edge. Minimum 180px (bleed margin).

w.description: Panel width in pixels. Panel right edge (x + w) must not exceed 5020px (5200 - 180 bleed).

h.description: Panel height in pixels. Panel bottom edge (y + h) must not exceed 7020px (7200 - 180 bleed).

ChapterStats.description: Aggregate statistics across all pages in the chapter. These values are read by MQG quality gates to evaluate chapter-level conventions.

total_panels.description: Total number of panels across all pages in the chapter.

silent_panel_count.description: Number of panels with zero bubble_zones. Used by MQG-02 silence density gate.

silent_panel_pct.description: Fraction of total panels that are silent. silent_panel_count / total_panels. Used by MQG-02.

avg_bubbles_per_page.description: Average total bubble_zones per page across the chapter. sum(dialogue_density per page). Used by MQG-08.

page_turn_payoff_count.description: Number of pages with page_turn_payoff: true. Used by MQG-06.

page_turn_payoff_odd_page_pct.description: Fraction of odd-numbered pages that have page_turn_payoff: true. Used by MQG-06.

establishing_shot_pages.description: Page numbers that contain at least one panel with emotional_role 'establishing' or size_class 'large' or bigger. Used by MQG-03.

protagonist_page_count.description: Number of pages on which at least one panel has protagonist_present: true. Null if protagonist_present was not computed. Used by MQG-07.

size_class_distribution.description: Count of panels by size_class across the chapter. Used by MQG-01 visual rhythm gate.

emotional_role_sequence.description: Ordered list of emotional_role values across all panels in reading order. Used by MQG-05 emotional arc progression gate.
